## register() function

Initiate a connection to the host app and its extension points.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function register<App extends AppConnection>(config: GuestConfigWithMethods<App["outgoing"]>): Promise<GuestServer<App>>;
```

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;[GuestServer](./uix-guest.guestserver.md)<!-- -->&lt;App&gt;&gt;

## Remarks

Creates the "main" [GuestServer](./uix-guest.guestserver.md)<!-- -->, which runs in the background without UI. Registers methods passed in the `methods` parameter, then resolves the returned Promise with the connected GuestServer object.
